Calamos Leads Again, Launching World's First Autocallable Growth ETF (CAGE) Accelerating Autocallable ETF Revolution

overview.description: The Calamos Autocallable Growth ETF (CAGE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is actively managed to provide the performance return of an index of weekly autocallable growth notes. Via synthetic exposure to a laddered portfolio of autocallables, the ETF reinvests coupons to compound potential growth, tax deferred. CAGE was launched on Apr 16, 2026 and is issued by Calamos.
